name: intent-clarifier
description: Clarify vague requests into clear goals, layered needs, personalized constraints, and direct answers.

interface.shortDescription: Clarify goals and constraints before acting
interface.longDescription: Turn an incomplete or conflicting request into a concise goal, layered needs, personalized constraints, and a direct answer with minimal questions.
defaultPrompt: Use $intent-clarifier to clarify my request and answer it directly with minimal questions.
